caption: A man with blonde hair and glasses, wearing a black t-shirt and white headphones, is positioned in a room with a Christmas tree and a screen displaying "20" in the background. He appears expressive, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The scene transitions from a close-up of the man to a digital presentation featuring a large, stylized 3D icon of a black and neon-green bottle or container with the bold white text "U1" on it. This digital object is set against a blue and black background with glowing neon-green horizontal lines. In the subsequent scenes, the man remains visible in a smaller picture-in-picture window in the bottom-left corner, continuing to gesture excitedly while the large "U1" graphic remains the central focus of the screen.
